info.title: Operations Center — Machine Alerts API
info.description:
Retrieve **alerts** captured on the telematics **terminal** for a machine—conditions such as low fuel pressure, calibration faults, geofence events, and maintenance reminders. Response shape varies by **alert type**; some items include a **`definition`** object with additional detail.

**Media type:** Use **`Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`**.

**eTags:** This endpoint **does not** support John Deere’s `x-deere-signature` / eTag optimization—do not rely on conditional requests for change detection.

**Collections:** List responses typically use the **CollectionPage** wrapper (`total`, `links`, `values`) with default paging (`itemLimit`, `pageOffset`) like other platform APIs.

tags.name: Alerts
tags.description: Machine, geofence, maintenance, and related alerts from the display/terminal.

OAuth2AuthorizationCode.description: Three-legged OAuth 2.0 (authorization code) for John Deere Precision Tech platform APIs. This endpoint requires **`eq1`**. Request `offline_access` if you need refresh tokens. Discover endpoints from the well-known URL.

scopes.eq1: Equipment Access Level 1 — view equipment and related alerts

Link.description: Hypermedia link (`@type` **Link**). Alert responses often include a **`machine`** link.

AlertDefinition.description: Optional structured detail for an alert when returned by the service. Fields depend on alert type.

MachineAlert.description: A single alert record. Types include **machine**, **geofence**, and **maintenance**; available properties differ. Use **`links`** (e.g. `machine`) to retrieve related resources.

@type.description: Axiom resource type discriminator when present.

severity.description: Normalized severity (may correlate with **color** in the UI).

color.description: Presentation hint: RED, YELLOW, GRAY, or BLUE (see product documentation for mapping to severity).

total.description: Total number of values available for this query.

get.description:
Returns alerts captured on the **terminal** for the machine identified by **`principalId`** (machine principal / resource id as returned by platform equipment and machine APIs). Alert **types** include machine diagnostics, **geofence**, and **maintenance**; response fields vary by type.

**Please note:** This API **does not** support eTags (`x-deere-signature`).

**OAuth scope:** `eq1`

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/machines/{principalId}/alerts`

parameters.name: principalId
parameters.description: Machine **principal id** for the machine whose alerts you are reading (from machine or equipment resources in `/platform`).

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use **`application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`** for Axiom v3 JSON responses (recommended for all calls).

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: BCP 47 language tag for **notification text** in the response when the service localizes strings. Examples: `en`, `en-US`, `es`, `pt_BR`. Supported tags include: bg, cs, da, el, en, es, et, fi, fr, hr, hu, is, it, ja, kk, lt, lv, mk, nl, no, pl, pt, pt_BR, ro, ru, sk, sl, sr, sv, th, tr, uk, zh (availability per string may vary).

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/machines/12345/alerts' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' \
  --header 'Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --header 'Accept-Language: en' \
  --header 'Accept-Encoding: gzip'

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token, expired access token, or application not licensed for the API.

403.description: Forbidden — user or client cannot access this machine or required OAuth scopes (ensure **`eq1`**) are not granted. May also indicate organization connection or terms (RCA) issues; check response headers such as **X-Deere-Warning** / **X-Deere-Terms-Location** when present.

404.description: Not found — **`principalId`** is not valid for the caller’s accessible resources.

429.description: Too many requests — honor **Retry-After** when returned.

503.description: Service unavailable — retry with backoff; honor **Retry-After** when returned.
